request.description:
Creates a new space that is only visible to the creator. This method is
the same as the [Create space](#api-space-post) method with permissions
set to the current user only. Note, currently you cannot set space
labels when creating a space.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Create Space(s)' global permission.

response.name: Returned if the space is created.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- The request is invalid.
- The space already exists.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.
Returned if the user does not have permission to create a space.

item.name: Atlassian Add New Custom Content Permission To Space

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its content.

request.description:
Adds new custom content permission to space.

If the permission to be added is a group permission, the group can be identified
by its group name or group id.

Note: Only apps can access this REST resource and only make changes to the respective app permissions.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the requested content is returned.

Used for various errors. Such as:
- Permission already exists for the given user or group.
- 'read space' permission doesn't exist for the given user or group.
- No group found with the given groupName or groupId

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.
Returned if the user isn't authorized.

Returned if any of the following is true:
- There is no space with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its content.
(Required) Id of the permission to be deleted.

request.description:
Removes a space permission. Note that removing Read Space permission for a user or group will remove all
the space permissions for that user or group.

Note: Apps cannot access this REST resource - including when utilizing user impersonation.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Permission successfully removed.

Used for various errors. Such as:
- All of the admin permissions cannot be removed from a space.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.
Returned if the user isn't authorized.

Returned if any of the following is true:
- There is no permission with the given id.
- There is no space with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

item.name: Atlassian Add New Permission To Space

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its content.

request.description:
Adds new permission to space.

If the permission to be added is a group permission, the group can be identified
by its group name or group id.

Note: Apps cannot access this REST resource - including when utilizing user impersonation.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the requested content is returned.

Used for various errors. Such as:
- Permission already exists for the given user or group.
- 'read space' permission doesn't exist for the given user or group.
- No group found with the given groupName or groupId

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.
Returned if the user isn't authorized.

Returned if any of the following is true:
- There is no space with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

query.description:
A multi-value parameter indicating which properties of the space
property to expand. By default, the `version` object is expanded.

- `version` returns information about the version of the content.
- `space` returns the space that the properties are in.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space that the property is in.
(Required) The key of the space property.

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns a space property.

**[Permissions required](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw)**: ‘View’ permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the requested space property is returned.

query.description:
A multi-value parameter indicating which properties of the space
property to expand. By default, the `version` object is expanded.

- `version` returns information about the version of the content.
- `space` returns the space that the properties are in.

response.name:
Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given key.
- There is no property with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

query.description:
A multi-value parameter indicating which properties of the space
property to expand. By default, the `version` object is expanded.

- `version` returns information about the version of the content.
- `space` returns the space that the properties are in.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space that the property is in.
(Required) The key of the property to be updated.

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Updates a space property. Note, you cannot update the key of a space
property, only the value.

**[Permissions required](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw)**:
‘Admin’ permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the space property is updated.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- The given property has a different spaceKey to the one in the path.
- The property has a different key to the one in the path.

Returned if the user does not have permission to edit the space with
the given spaceKey

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given spaceKey
- There is no property with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

Returned if the given version is does not match the expected target
version of the updated property
Returned if the value of the property is too long.

item.name: Atlassian Create Space Property For Key

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space that the property will be created in.
(Required) The key of the property to be created.

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Creates a new space property. This is the same as `POST
/wiki/rest/api/space/{spaceKey}/property` but the key for the property is passed as a
path parameter, rather than in the request body.

**[Permissions required](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw)**:
‘Admin’ permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the space property is created.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- The space already has a value with the given key.
- No property value was provided.

Returned if the user does not have the 'Admin' permission for the
space.
Returned if the value for the property is too long.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space that the property is in.
(Required) The key of the property to be deleted.

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Deletes a space property.

**[Permissions required](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw)**:
‘Admin’ permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the space property is deleted.
Returned if the user does not have 'Admin' permission for the space.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given spaceKey
- There is no property with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

response.name: Returned if space settings are updated.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.

item.name: Atlassian Get Content State Settings For Space

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its content state settings.

request.description:
Get object describing whether content states are allowed at all, if custom content states or space content states
are restricted, and a list of space content states allowed for the space if they are not restricted.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Space admin permission

response.name: Returned if the requested space exists, and user has space admin permission.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing from the request.
Returned if user does not have space admin permission.
Returned if the space with given key can not be found.

item.name: Atlassian Get Space Suggested Content States

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its content state settings.

request.description:
Get content states that are suggested in the space.
**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Space view permission

response.name: Returned if the requested space exists, and user has space view permission.
Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing from the request.
Returned if user does not have space admin permission.
Returned if the space with given key can not be found.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be queried for its theme.

request.description:
Returns the theme selected for a space, if one is set. If no space
theme is set, this means that the space is inheriting the global look
and feel settings.

**[Permissions required](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw)**: ‘View’ permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the requested theme is returned.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given key.
- The space does not have a theme assigned to it.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to set the theme for.

request.description:
Sets the theme for a space. Note, if you want to reset the space theme to
the default Confluence theme, use the 'Reset space theme' method instead
of this method.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the theme was set for the space.
Returned if the theme key is invalid.
Returned if there is no space with the given key.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to reset the theme for.

request.description:
Resets the space theme. This means that the space will inherit the
global look and feel settings

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the theme was reset for the space.
Returned if there is no space with the given key.

query.description: The start point of the collection to return.
The limit of the number of items to return, this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

request.description: Returns a list of watchers of a space

response.name: Returned if watchers list is returned.

query.description: The start point of the collection to return.
The limit of the number of items to return, this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

response.name: Returned if there is no space with the given key

query.description: The start point of the collection to return.
The limit of the number of items to return, this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

Filters the results to labels with the specified prefix. If this parameter
is not specified, then labels with any prefix will be returned.

- `global` prefix is used by labels that are on content within the provided space.
- `my` prefix can be explicitly added by a user when adding a label
via the UI, e.g. 'my:example-label'.
- `team` prefix is used for labels applied to the space.
The starting index of the returned labels.

The maximum number of labels to return per page. Note,
this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to get labels for.

request.description:
Returns a list of labels associated with a space. Can provide a prefix as well as other filters to
select different types of labels.

response.name: Returned if the list of labels is returned.

query.description:
Filters the results to labels with the specified prefix. If this parameter
is not specified, then labels with any prefix will be returned.

- `global` prefix is used by labels that are on content within the provided space.
- `my` prefix can be explicitly added by a user when adding a label
via the UI, e.g. 'my:example-label'.
- `team` prefix is used for labels applied to the space.
The starting index of the returned labels.

The maximum number of labels to return per page. Note,
this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

Filters the results to labels with the specified prefix. If this parameter
is not specified, then labels with any prefix will be returned.

- `global` prefix is used by labels that are on content within the provided space.
- `my` prefix can be explicitly added by a user when adding a label
via the UI, e.g. 'my:example-label'.
- `team` prefix is used for labels applied to the space.
The starting index of the returned labels.

The maximum number of labels to return per page. Note,
this may be restricted by fixed system limits.

item.name: Atlassian Add Labels To A Space

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to add labels to.

request.description:
Adds labels to a piece of content. Does not modify the existing labels.

Notes:

- Labels can also be added when creating content ([Create content](#api-content-post)).
- Labels can be updated when updating content ([Update content](#api-content-id-put)).
This will delete the existing labels and replace them with the labels in
the request.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
Permission to update the content.

response.name: Returned if the labels are added to the content.

Returned if;

- The body contains labels with invalid characters or too many characters.
- The body contains too many labels.
- The target content would contain too many labels after the operation.
- The calling user does not have permission to edit label
Returned if the calling user can view but not edit the content.

item.name: Atlassian Remove Label From A Space

query.description: (Required) The name of the label to remove
The prefix of the label to remove. If not provided defaults to global.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to remove a labels from.

request.description: Needs a more full description created.

response.name: Returned if the label was successfully deleted.

query.description: (Required) The name of the label to remove
The prefix of the label to remove. If not provided defaults to global.

response.name:
Returned if;
- The user does not provide a label name

query.description: (Required) The name of the label to remove
The prefix of the label to remove. If not provided defaults to global.
(Required) The name of the label to remove
The prefix of the label to remove. If not provided defaults to global.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to be returned.

request.description:
Deprecated, use [Confluence's v2 API](https://developer.atlassian.com/cloud/confluence/rest/v2/intro/).

Returns a space. This includes information like the name, description,
and permissions, but not the content in the space.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'View' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the requested space is returned.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to view the space.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to update.

request.description:
Updates the name, description, or homepage of a space.

- For security reasons, permissions cannot be updated via the API and
must be changed via the user interface instead.
- Currently you cannot set space labels when updating a space.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returned if the space is updated.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given key
- The calling user does not have permission to update the space.

variable.description: (Required) The key of the space to delete.

request.description:
Deletes a space. Note, the space will be deleted in a long running task.
Therefore, the space may not be deleted yet when this method has
returned. Clients should poll the status link that is returned in the
response until the task completes.

**[Permissions](https://confluence.atlassian.com/x/_AozKw) required**:
'Admin' permission for the space.

response.name: Returns a pointer to the status of the space deletion task.

Returned if the authentication credentials are incorrect or missing
from the request.

Returned if any of the following is true:

- There is no space with the given key.
- The calling user does not have permission to delete the space.
